parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study provides direct causal, indirect mechanistic, or associative evidence linking STAT5B to proximal TCR inhibition, checkpoint response, anergy, hyporesponsiveness, or exhaustion with impaired TCR function. Retrieved evidence is confined to general T cell proliferation/activation (PMC11349758), TCR-driven leukemogenesis with enhanced (not inhibited) TCR signalling (PMC2196089, PMC11014662, PMC5749501), and non-T-cell or structural systems. The only inhibitory-lineage link (PMC11722272, CD4+ Treg accumulation) is lineage/differentiation, which is explicitly insufficient for moderate. This meets weak criteria (general activation/proliferation/differentiation and non-T-cell systems).
